name: Cherry Pie--9-inch
recipeIngredient: 6 Cups Fresh Red Tart Cherries, Pitted
3 Cans Pitted Red Tart Cherries, (16 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Prepare the pastry according to package instructions.
3. In a large bowl, mix together sugar and flour.
4. Stir in the cherries.
5. Place cherry mixture into the prepared pie crust.
6. Dot with margarine or butter.
7. Cover with top crust, cutting slits in it for ventilation.
8. Seal and flute the edges of the crust.
9. Wrap a 2- to 3-inch strip of aluminum foil around the edge of the crust to prevent excessive browning.
10. Bake for 35 to 45 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the juice begins to bubble through the slits in the crust.
8 SERVINGS; 505 CALORIES PER SERVING.
